attestation.statement: Clinician confirmed in writing having clinically reviewed all 51 answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation)

transform_flags: case_id SEQ provisional (00007, derived from source AUC-007) — maintainer to confirm/reassign within the SPEC-GI-01 bucket.

Source note describes clinician-measured vitals (BP 90/60, HR 118, capillary refill 4s) and a digital rectal exam confirming melaena on glove; presentation layer de-anchored to patient-reportable/video-observable content (pallor visible on video, reported presyncope) with all direct measurements and PR exam sealed into 10/11.

Draft SNOMED placeholders in 10_ground_truth_node.differential_progression for dietary melanosis and lower GI bleed entries were corrected to real candidate codes (389084007, 61686007) prior to finalising this bundle.
Exact age not stated in source; a plausible middle-aged adult age (55) consistent with the alcohol-use history and 'spouse present' framing was assigned as a conservative placeholder.
No guideline references were cited in the source note; guideline_references left as an empty array.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
